summary_markdown:
## What this issue is about
This issue seeks to enhance the `documentation_starter` template by adding support for GitLab. Currently, the template supports only GitHub, requiring manual edits for GitLab usage.

## What needs to be done
We want to incorporate GitLab functionalities into the `documentation_starter` template. This may involve adjusting variables and structures to ensure compatibility. Collaboration with a GitLab user would be beneficial.

## Helpful background
The discussion indicates that some groundwork has been done with the new structure of the `documentation_starter` template, but a complete analysis of the modified template in relation to GitLab is still ongoing. There are insights from past adjustments made by other contributors, which might guide this enhancement.

## Good first steps
1. Familiarize yourself with the `documentation_starter` template in the [repository](https://github.com/plone/cookieplone-templates).
2. Reach out to potential collaborators like @erral for insights on variable usage.
3. Test the current setup if you have a GitLab account, and identify any areas that need updating based on your findings.
4. Review existing discussions and consider what documentation or examples might be needed for future contributors.
